case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. NICK VRATARI et al

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT VRATARI, NICK
